# mpremote
## linux will change ttyACM on disconnect or using the web editor 
## replace `*` with the correct number obtained with `mpremote devs`

Copy src/DanceDance to kepoco (OVERWRITES)            : `mpremote connect /dev/ttyACM* fs cp -r src/DanceDance :Games/DanceDance/`
Copy kepoco DanceDance to src/DanceDance (OVERWRITES) : `mpremote connect /dev/ttyACM* fs cp -r :Games/DanceDance/ src/DanceDance`
Delete files from kepoco                              : `mpremote connect /dev/ttyACM* fs rm :Games/DanceDance/`
Run local code on kepoco                              : `mpremote connect /dev/ttyACM* run src/DanceDance`

# notes ctypes

## Structs
``` c
struct foo {
  int* foo;
  float baz;
  char* name;
};
```

``` python
class foo(Structure):
  _fields_ = [("foo", c_int),
              ("baz", )]
```

# Things that went Wrong
- [ ] Audio is choppy when updating the time in the audio loop. | Fix: :(
- [x] Reading both audio file and sm file | Fix: load sm file first parse it and then delete the read txt just keeping the data we need.
- [x] Reading in wav files. | Fix: parse the header, get the data, stream the data with seek and read in python and fill the buffers.
